testcase.name: test_job_status_res_partner_returns_502_when_ods_unavailable

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 502/404, got 401 assert 401 in [502, 404] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ods_sync.py:54: in test_job_status_res_partner_returns_502_when_ods_unavailable assert response.status_code in [502, 404], f"Expected 502/404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 502/404, got 401 E assert 401 in [502, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
